evals.prompt: I need to implement a new L3 business capability called PolicyManagement for the Maif namespace. The main aggregate is InsurancePolicy. It should support two commands: CreatePolicy (emits PolicyCreated) and SuspendPolicy (emits PolicySuspended). Bus channel: maif-policy-management-channel.
evals.expected_output: Full project scaffold under sources/PolicyManagement/ with all 5 layers (Domain, Application, Infrastructure, Presentation, Contracts), random local port, docker-compose with offset MongoDB/RabbitMQ ports, all placeholder substitutions completed, and a nuget.config with naive-unicorn feed.

assertions.name: all-five-layers
assertions.description: All 5 project directories exist: Domain, Application, Infrastructure, Presentation, Contracts

assertions.name: aggregate-ar-file
assertions.description: InsurancePolicyAR.cs exists in the Domain layer

assertions.name: two-commands-exist
assertions.description: Both CreatePolicyCommand.cs and SuspendPolicyCommand.cs exist in Contracts/Commands

assertions.name: two-events-exist
assertions.description: Both PolicyCreated.cs and PolicySuspended.cs exist in Contracts/Events

assertions.name: nuget-config
assertions.description: nuget.config exists and contains naive-unicorn GitHub Packages feed

assertions.name: random-port-in-hot-json
assertions.description: hot.json contains a Port value that is a number in range 10000-59999

assertions.name: docker-compose-offset-ports
assertions.description: docker-compose.yml uses ports derived from the base port (not hardcoded 27017/5672)

assertions.name: program-cs-wires-both-services
assertions.description: Program.cs registers both ICreatePolicyService and ISuspendPolicyService

evals.prompt: Scaffold a new business capability for claims processing. Namespace: FoodarooExperience, capability name: ClaimsProcessing, main aggregate: Claim. One command: FileClaim, emits ClaimFiled.
evals.expected_output: Full scaffold under sources/ClaimsProcessing/ with correct FoodarooExperience namespace substitution, ClaimAR.cs, FileClaimCommand.cs, ClaimFiled.cs, Program.cs, all 5 .csproj files, docker-compose, cold.json and hot.json with ports.

assertions.name: namespace-correct
assertions.description: Generated files use FoodarooExperience.ClaimsProcessing namespace (not generic placeholders)

assertions.name: cold-json-has-claim-lower
assertions.description: cold.json connection strings reference claims-processing (not a placeholder)
